queries.question: Show all screenwriters and editors with 15 completed projects.
queries.sql:
SELECT Screenwriters.name
FROM Screenwriters
WHERE Screenwriters.Number_Of_Projects_Completed = 15
UNION
SELECT Editors.name
FROM Editors
WHERE Editors.Number_Of_Projects_Completed = 15
